examplePosts: Buyer priorities shift—and agents who spot the shifts early serve their clients best.

Just back from Inman Connect NYC. Three things stood out: The best agents focus on authenticity, not AI gimmicks. Top performers invest in educating past clients, not chasing cold leads. And a major shift in how homes are listed may be coming. We believe in more transparency, not less. More soon.

Huge thank you to Michele Lerner and Green Builder Media for this feature on Pearl. We're working to help people see how a home actually performs—not just what it looks like, but how it feels to live in.
